zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester於1215年出生在英國爾阿爾德福德時，他的父親Sir John Arderne of Alvanley25歲，母親Margaret d'Aldford20歲。他於大約1247年與Agnes de Orreby在英國爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1265年在英國英格蘭爾享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester于1215年出生在英国爾阿爾德福德时，他的父亲Sir John Arderne of Alvanley25岁，母亲Margaret d'Aldford20岁。他于大约1247年与Agnes de Orreby在英国爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1265年在英国英格兰爾享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾。

nameMeanings.name: d'Arderne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Patrice, Jacques.
French and Walloon: habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from the Ardennes, a forested plateau in northeastern France, Belgium (Wallonia), and Luxembourg.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from a place called Ardenne, for example in Charente-Maritime and Haute-Loire.

nameMeanings.name: Walkelin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wakeland
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Walklin, from the Middle English personal name Walchelin, Wakelin, a Norman French double diminutive of the ancient Germanic personal name Walho or Walico.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester was born in 1215, in Aldford, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir John Arderne of Alvanley, was 25 and his mother, Margaret d'Aldford, was 20. He married Agnes de Orreby about 1247, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1265, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester est né en 1215, à Aldford, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Arderne of Alvanley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret d'Aldford, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Orreby environ 1247, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1265, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester 1215 in Aldford, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Arderne of Alvanley 25 und seine Mutter Margaret d'Aldford 20. Er hat um 1247 in Cheshire, England Agnes de Orreby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1265 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester è nato il nel 1215 nel Aldford, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Arderne of Alvanley, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret d'Aldford, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Orreby circa 1247, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1265, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chesterが1215年にイギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォードで生まれた時，父Sir John Arderne of Alvanleyは25歳，母Margaret d'Aldfordは20歳であった。約1247年にイギリスチェシュアイアでAgnes de Orrebyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1265年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester(이)가 1215년 영국 체실르 알드퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Arderne of Alvanley(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret d'Aldford(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1247년 영국 체실르에서 Agnes de Orreby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1265년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에 묻혔다.

pt.1241: de 8 de janeiro de 1241 a 7 de janeiro de 1242
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester nasceu em 1215, em Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Arderne of Alvanley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret d'Aldford, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Orreby aproximadamente 1247, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1265, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester родился в 1215 г. в местности алдфорд, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Arderne of Alvanley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret d'Aldford, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Orreby около 1247 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1265 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.1241: desde 8 de enero de 1241 hasta 7 de enero de 1242
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester nació en 1215, en Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Arderne of Alvanley, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret d'Aldford, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Agnes de Orreby aproximadamente 1247, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1265, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
